'''Shelov''' was a [[Herglic/Legends|Herglic]] inhabitant of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Abregado-rae/Legends|Abregado-rae]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Shelov, with the support of numerous other offworlders, first established the [[Tundei Tribunal]], the new government of the planet. Shelov later assumed a leadership role in the organization after the fall of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]].<ref name="CCW" />

{{Char-stub}}
